<hr/> <h4>Paths</h4> <p> Below are the source code lines that represent each code path as identified by Xdebug. Please note a path is not necessarily coterminous with a line, a line may contain multiple paths and therefore show up more than once. Please also be aware that some paths may include implicit rather than explicit branches, e.g. an <code>if</code> statement <i>always</i> has an <code>else</code> as part of its logical flow even if you didn't write one. </p> {{paths}}
